title: Stock Radar: SBI Cards & Payment Services stock showing signs of turnaround after falling over 30% from highs; time to buy?
summary: SBI Cards stock is showing potential for an uptrend after a significant fall. Experts suggest buying the stock for a target of Rs 800 in coming weeks. The stock has broken above a descending trendline on rising volume. Momentum indicators are showing a bullish shift, signaling accumulation. Traders with a high-risk profile can consider this opportunity.
